title: polypodium thunbergianum var. contortum
intro: Polypodium thunbergianum var. contortum, also known as Contorted Polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
